title: Load / Stress / Soak / Spike Runner Output
description: Output of qa-load-stress-runner agent (CAPABILITY-UPGRADE Wave A, Q1). Runs k6 open-model (ramping-arrival-rate) load/stress/soak/spike profiles + breakpoint/capacity-ceiling discovery against an AUTHORIZED NON-PRODUCTION target only. Asserts reliability SLOs via k6 thresholds. Consumed by enterprise-qa-testing Load/Reliability layer (§4). decision_hint is a draft — the parent skill / deterministic gate makes the final call.

target.description: staging/lab/preview base URL — production is BLOCKED per parent Hard Rule §2.6

is_production.description: MUST be false; a passing run against a production/unproven-production target is INVALID

environment_confirmed_by.description: handle/source that positively proved the target is non-production

achieved_rps.description: MUST come from real k6 summary, never invented

notes.description: THRESHOLD_WEAKENED: prefixed entries surface (do not act on) loosened thresholds / shortened soak duration / lowered expected_peak_rps

decision_hint.description: Agent's draft assessment; parent skill / deterministic gate makes final decision. Production/unproven target => BLOCKED, never PASS.
